title: Business Flow - Lifecycle
subtitle: Complete view of the process from prospect to profitability
infoBannerText: Each stage is connected and automated. Approving a quote automatically generates a project. Projects generate work orders, which consume materials and generate costs. Invoicing and final costs determine the real margin.
automationCard1Text: When approving a quote, a project is automatically generated with all the configuration
automationCard2Text: Projects generate work orders that coordinate teams and activities
automationCard3Text: Work orders generate material and labor consumption, impacting actual costs
automationCard4Text: The difference between invoicing and actual investment determines the profit margin
flow1Description: Standard sales pipeline with progressive qualification
flow2Description: Kit configurator with swaps, add-ons and services. Multiple iterative versions
flow3Description: Generates project with phases, tasks, planned materials and assigned team
flow4Description: Team coordination, material consumption and progress tracking
flow5Description: Record of materials used, labor and actual costs incurred
flow6Description: Invoicing based on progress and payment terms (advance + milestones + balance)
flow7Description: Comparison between estimated and real margin, deviation identification
